message:
test(rchd): Add health.rs coverage tests

Add 14 new tests for WorkerHealth and HealthMonitor:
- test_worker_health_last_result
- test_worker_health_last_result_failure
- test_worker_health_can_probe_closed
- test_worker_health_can_probe_half_open
- test_worker_health_start_probe
- test_health_monitor_new
- test_health_monitor_with_status_panel
- test_health_monitor_with_alert_manager
- test_health_check_result_record_metrics
- test_health_config_custom
- test_health_check_result_checked_at

All rchd tests pass. Coverage improved for health.rs module.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
